n: To the Appledores: Restocking the Apple Stall

steps.t: The Appledores orchard is in Hobbiton, just west of the Hill and Bag End. You should run to the famed apple farm and return with a basket of apples be…
Sperling Took, the supplier of the Farmers Faire, can be found in Bywater. You should return to Bywater as quickly as you can, taking bites of the pie…
